ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil layer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_no" INTEGER /* Layer number within the project */,
  "depth_from" REAL /* Depth from which the layer starts (in meters) */,
  "depth_to" REAL /* Depth to which the layer extends (in meters) */,
  "total_unit_weight" REAL /* Total unit weight of the soil (in kN/m3) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., SAND, CLAY) */,
  "water_unit_weight" REAL /* Unit weight of water (in kN/m3) */,
  "effective_unit_weight" REAL /* Effective unit weight of the soil (in kN/m3) */,
  "hydrostatic_pressure_from" REAL /* Hydrostatic pressure at the top of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "hydrostatic_pressure_to" REAL /* Hydrostatic pressure at the bottom of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "vertical_effective_stress_from" REAL /* Vertical effective stress at the top of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "vertical_effective_stress_to" REAL /* Vertical effective stress at the bottom of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "vertical_total_stress_from" REAL /* Vertical total stress at the top of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "vertical_total_stress_to" REAL /* Vertical total stress at the bottom of the layer (in kPa) */,
  "porosity" REAL /* Porosity of the soil layer */,
  "permeability" REAL /* Permeability of the soil layer */,
  "cohesion" REAL /* Cohesion of the soil layer */,
  "friction_angle" REAL /* Friction angle of the soil layer */,
  "soil_test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the soil layer data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the soil layer data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_layers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geotechnical_engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geotechnical engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Name of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the geotechnical engineer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the geotechnical engineer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the site supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the site supervisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the site supervisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the site supervisor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the site supervisor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the site supervisor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geotechnical engineer */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site supervisor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team member was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team member's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES geotechnical_engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES site_supervisors ("supervisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil layer being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES geotechnical_engineers ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES soil_layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)
